Your secret hideaway
in paradise

Beachfront cottages on a pristine hidden beach in Nagtabon, Palawan. Wake up to the sound of the ocean, sleep under the stars, and live the experience travelers from around the world call "their favorite place on the island."

Check AvailabilityExplore paradise
Nagtabon Beach, Palawan40 min from airportFamily-run
Playa Paraiso Nagtabon Beach

More than a hotel, a home by the sea

Just 40 minutes from Puerto Princesa airport, hidden along the stunning Nagtabon Beach, lies our retreat. Four cozy cottages and a large house set among sprawling palm groves, with turquoise waters just steps from your door.

We're a wonderful local family who opened the doors to this paradise to share it with you. You won't find a 5-star hotel here — you'll find something better: a place that feels like home, with the most beautiful beach in Palawan as your garden.

Accommodation

Cottages that embrace
the soul of the beach

Each cottage is designed to let paradise pour through the window. Fully equipped, private outdoor bathroom, and the sound of the ocean as your alarm clock.

18 m²

Standard Cottage

Cozy cottage with private outdoor bathroom. Perfect for couples seeking an authentic beachfront experience.

  • Queen size bed
  • Outdoor bathroom
  • Ceiling fan
  • Private hammock
  • Garden views
View details
35 m²

King Cottage

Our most spacious and luxurious cottage with king size bed, generous outdoor bathroom, and ocean-view terrace.

  • King size bed
  • Spacious outdoor bathroom
  • Private terrace
  • Ocean views
  • 35 m² of space
View details
Up to 6 guests

The Big House

Ideal for families or groups. Fully independent house with multiple bedrooms, private kitchen, and shared living space.

  • Multiple bedrooms
  • Equipped kitchen
  • Living & dining room
  • Outdoor terrace
  • For families & groups

The Beach

Nagtabon: fine sand, perfect waves, impossible sunsets

A pristine, stone-free beach with fine sand where you can swim all day, surf secret waves, or simply sway in a hammock watching the ocean.

Surf at a secret spot

Perfect waves for all levels at a spot only locals know. Boards available.

Otherworldly sunsets

The most spectacular sunsets in Palawan, right from your oceanfront hammock.

Crowd-free virgin beach

Fine sand, no rocks, turquoise waters, and miles of beach almost all to yourself.

Discover all experiences
What our guests say

"My favorite place on the whole island"

Excellent hotel right in front of the beach. The facilities are very good, with a small and cozy fully equipped cottage. The outdoor bathroom is well kept and clean.

Alejandro Cornejo Velázquez
Couple

A beautiful spot to enjoy the beach at Nagtabon. Lovely, clean cottages — a real pleasure to sleep here.

Ingrid Fuster
Couple

It was an unforgettable experience. The owners were so kind, helpful, attentive, and big-hearted. It's a corner of paradise.

Horia Dumitrescu
Family

What an incredible place. If you're looking for something off the beaten path to disconnect, this is the perfect spot. A wonderful local family who made us feel at home.

David Francis
Couple

Absolute paradise. Our favorite place on our 8-day Palawan adventure. We ended up extending our stay and could have easily stayed for weeks.

Krystal Ryan
Couple

The owner, Ms. Bon, is very helpful and was always willing to provide everything we needed. We felt so welcomed, as if we were part of the family.

Gwen
